title: Human Genome Projects and Human Cloning
author: Satya Nilayam Research Institute of Philosophy & Culture
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Headlines about DNA, genes, and the new powers of scientists to analyze and manipulate these fundamental elements of life vie for our attention daily. The dazzling diversity of applications of DNA science to fields renging from medicine and agriculture to forensics and environmental restoration undoubtedly will have resounding impacts on society and each of our own lives.
